title: Copy subitems from another board by a connected item column
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have in board A, a connected column (let’s call it column Z) to board B. 
Once i will choose an item (from board b items) in column Z, I would like that all 
subitems of the chosen item will be copied and conne…

posts.author: alon_h (Alon Hayun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I have in board A, a connected column (let’s call it column Z) to board B.
Once i will choose an item (from board b items) in column Z, I would like that all
subitems of the chosen item will be copied and connected from board B to board A
as Subitems.
I thought that the “Subitem auto” integration will help me but it was limited.
Waiting for your help
Alon

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can do this using make.com

  1. Send a webhook to make.com when column Z changes.
  2. Iterate the subitems of the selected parent item in make.com.
  3. Create subitems on Board A with column values.

Hope this helps

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alon_h , thanks for posting your question here in the community (and welcome!)

I published an article with a video guide on how you can do that monday.com Here it is

Same Item Multiple Boards

How to copy subitems from another board by a connected item column

Use case from a monday user

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @alon_h,

I’m Daniel, we’re the creators of Subitem Automations. We’re now working on a new version that will allow to copy subitems from one board to the other. It should be out later this week.

Can you reach out to me at daniel@fantasymedia.io so we can discuss to make sure it meets your needs and make the relevant changes if needed?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alon, I missed out from this thread so just wanted to share that the VLOOKUP app is perfect for the usecase of copy subitems from another monday.com board based on a key value - which is an alternative to the connect board functionality.

Here is a demo. I hope it helps
